mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_counter_repair_outbox( source_user_id, target_user_id, operation, reason, correlation_id, status, retry_count, next_retry_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES( #{sourceUserId}, #{targetUserId}, #{operation}, #{reason}, #{correlationId}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{nextRetryTime}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, source_user_id AS sourceUserId, target_user_id AS targetUserId, operation, reason, correlation_id AS correlationId, status, retry_count AS retryCount, next_retry_time AS nextRetryTime, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM user_counter_repair_outbox WHERE status = #{status} AND (next_retry_time IS NULL OR next_retry_time <= #{now}) ORDER BY update_time ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_counter_repair_outbox SET status = 'DONE', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_counter_repair_outbox SET status = 'FAIL', retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
